title: Security and Fire Alarm Systems Installers
description: Install, program, maintain, and repair security and fire alarm wiring and equipment. Ensure that work is in accordance with relevant codes.

tasks.text: Install, maintain, or repair security systems, alarm devices, or related equipment, following blueprints of electrical layouts and building plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Mount and fasten control panels, door and window contacts, sensors, or video cameras, and attach electrical and telephone wiring to connect components.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Demonstrate systems for customers and explain details, such as the causes and consequences of false alarms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Test and repair circuits and sensors, following wiring and system specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Feed cables through access holes, roof spaces, or cavity walls to reach fixture outlets, positioning and terminating cables, wires, or strapping.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine systems to locate problems, such as loose connections or broken insulation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Test backup batteries, keypad programming, sirens, or other security features to ensure proper functioning or to diagnose malfunctions.
tasks.rationale: Software coding, programming, or application development task highly susceptible to automated generation.

tasks.text: Drill holes for wiring in wall studs, joists, ceilings, or floors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect installation sites and study work orders, building plans, and installation manuals to determine materials requirements and installation procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Consult with clients to assess risks and to determine security requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Mount raceways and conduits and fasten wires to wood framing, using staplers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adjust sensitivity of units, based on room structures and manufacturers' recommendations, using programming keypads.
tasks.rationale: Software coding, programming, or application development task highly susceptible to automated generation.

tasks.text: Keep informed of new products and developments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare documents, such as invoices or warranties.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide customers with cost estimates for equipment installation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
